name: shopify-automation-toolkit
description: Reusable Node.js toolkit to automate audits, SEO, content and image workflows for a Shopify store, driven by Markdown task files and powered by Gemini.

scripts.syntax-check: node -e "const{readdirSync,statSync}=require('fs');const{join}=require('path');const{execSync}=require('child_process');function walk(d){for(const f of readdirSync(d)){const p=join(d,f);if(statSync(p).isDirectory()&&!['node_modules','.git','.audit-tmp','store-data','generated-images'].includes(f))walk(p);else if(p.endsWith('.js'))execSync('node -c \"'+p+'\"',{stdio:'inherit'});}}walk('.');console.log('All JS files parse OK.');"
